SEARCH
Module geomed.app
Package geomed.app.explainability

Class GDPRReportingService

java.lang.Object
geomed.app.explainability.GDPRReportingService
public class GDPRReportingService extends Object
Service dedicated exclusively to transparency, auditability, and the generation of GDPR compliance reports.

This service fulfills the requirements of GDPR Articles 12, 13, and 22 by providing data subjects and auditors with clear, meaningful logic behind the automated medical dispatch decisions.

  • Constructor Details

    • GDPRReportingService

      public GDPRReportingService()

  • Method Details

    • generateGDPRSummary

      public String generateGDPRSummary(VictimIncident incident, DispatchDecision decision)
      Generates a detailed GDPR compliance report from the decision made by the dispatch engine.

      The report breaks down the scoring breakdown for the chosen facility and details the comparative automated rejection reasons for alternative facilities.

      Parameters:
      incident - the victim's medical incident details containing telemetry and history
      decision - the dispatch decision payload containing the chosen hospital and scoring matrix
      Returns:
      a formatted plain-text GDPR accessibility report, or an error message if data is incomplete

    • createAuditMessage

      public String createAuditMessage(VictimIncident incident, Hospital chosen)
      Creates a secure audit trail log message for tracking purposes.
      Parameters:
      incident - the incident that triggered the dispatch evaluation
      chosen - the hospital selected for the assignment
      Returns:
      a formatted audit log string
